pages.text: Reorganizes which enchantments exist and where you get them, so basic enchantments are easy to obtain while special ones are harder to find.$(br2)$(italic)Recommends Table Rework.$()

$(#7A2FBF)$(bold)Common$()$(br)Basic power boosts. In the enchanting table by default; also from random loot and mob equipment.$(br2)Efficiency, Protection, Sharpness, Unbreaking, Power, Piercing, Quick Charge, Impaling, Loyalty, Lure.

$(#7A2FBF)$(bold)Uncommon$()$(br)Specialized or auxiliary effects. Bought from villagers, and found on random loot and mob spawn equipment.$(br2)Aqua Affinity, Feather Falling, the Protections, Smite, Bane of Arthropods, Sweeping Edge, Knockback, Punch, Density, Breach, Looting, Luck of the Sea.

$(#7A2FBF)$(bold)Rare$()$(br)Unique, magical abilities found in $(italic)specific structure loot$(), random loot, and mob equipment.$(br2)Frost Walker, Fire Aspect, Flame, Silk Touch, Fortune, Lunge, Respiration, Depth Strider, Channeling, Riptide, Thorns, Infinity, Multishot.

pages.title: Rare Finds
pages.text: A rare enchanted book waiting in structure loot.

$(#7A2FBF)$(bold)Unique$()$(br)Only from their special sources (unchanged from vanilla):$(br)$(li)Soul Speed - piglin bartering $(li)Swift Sneak - ancient city $(li)Wind Burst - ominous vault$(br2)Also: zombies can spawn with iron pickaxes, with the same enchant chance as swords and shovels.
